description: Provider-neutral external uptime monitor manifest for the public Platform production edge.

providerNotes.cloudflare: Create Health Checks or Synthetic Tests from these targets after DNS is live.
providerNotes.betterstack: Create HTTPS keyword/status monitors with the same status and latency thresholds.
providerNotes.uptimerobot: Create HTTPS monitors for public targets and keyword checks where expectedBodyIncludes is set.
providerNotes.evidenceTemplate: Copy monitoring/external-uptime-provider.example.json, fill provider monitor ids, regions, verifiedAt, lastStatusCode, lastLatencyMs and lastCheckedAt after a live provider API/dashboard verification, then pass it with --providerEvidence.
